name: INT-0 Service Normalization
description: Normalize meeting extraction: Core owns extraction and formatting. CLI and Backend orchestrate.

tasks.title: Move Formatting Functions to Core
tasks.description: Move formatStagedSections() and updateMeetingContent() from backend to core's meeting-extraction.ts. Adapt to work with MeetingIntelligence type (structured ActionItem[]).
acceptanceCriteria: updateMeetingContent(content: string, stagedSections: string) exported from core
Both functions work with MeetingIntelligence type
Test: complete intelligence → all sections with correct IDs (ai_001, de_001, le_001)
Test: ActionItem formatting includes owner, direction, description
Test: no existing summary → appends at end
Test: existing summary → replaces in place
Test: preserves content after staged sections

tasks.title: Create CLI Extraction Command
tasks.description: Add `arete meeting extract` command using core extraction via AIService. Supports --json, --stage, --dry-run flags.
acceptanceCriteria: arete meeting extract <file> outputs human-readable extraction
--stage writes staged sections to meeting file
--dry-run shows what would be written without writing
Early check: if aiService.isConfigured() === false, error with clear message
Test: happy path with mock AIService
Test: no AI configured → clear error

tasks.title: Backend Uses Core Functions
tasks.description: Backend imports formatStagedSections and updateMeetingContent from core. Create type adapter to bridge MeetingExtraction → MeetingIntelligence.

tasks.title: Update Skill with CLI-First Path
tasks.description: Update process-meetings skill to document CLI command as primary path with agent fallback for no-API-key case.
acceptanceCriteria: Skill documents arete meeting extract as primary path
Skill shows how to check for AI config
Skill provides full agent fallback for no-API-key case
Files this skill reads/writes section updated
